/usr/bin/cc -fPIC   -shared -Wl,-soname,libolei_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libolei_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/olei_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/olei_interfaces/msg/detail/vf_header__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/olei_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/olei_interfaces/msg/detail/v2_header__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/grz/trolley_auto_drive_image/code/build/olei_interfaces:/opt/ros/foxy/lib: libolei_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/foxy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl
